pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:24 defines PROJECT_DIR="/home/ga/projects/payment-validator"; export_result.sh and verifier.py reference this path
export_result.sh:8 defines IMAGE_TAG="payment-validator:secure"; verifier.py and export_result.sh reference this tag consistently

verifier.py:22 retrieves max_size_mb from metadata with default 20; line 54 enforces the check: if size_mb < max_size_mb. This is reasonable for a scratch-based Go binary which typically ranges 5-20MB

setup_task.sh:56 contains: fmt.Printf("HTTPS check passed. Status: %s\n", resp.Status); export_result.sh:46 validates: if echo "$LOGS" | grep -q "HTTPS check passed"; verifier.py:80 checks this criterion
setup_task.sh:26 runs chown ga:ga "$PROJECT_DIR"; line 103 runs chown -R ga:ga "$PROJECT_DIR"; line 106 uses su - ga -c to launch terminal as user 'ga'

verifier.py:84 contains: passed = score >= metadata.get('pass_threshold', 80); scoring criteria sum to 100 points maximum (image created 10+rebuilt 10+size 20+non-root 20+no shell 20+https 20=100), passing at 80
setup_task.sh:77 specifies 'go 1.21' in go.mod; Go 1.21 is an official release from go.dev with extensive documentation
setup_task.sh:84 specifies 'FROM ubuntu:22.04' in the initial Dockerfile; Ubuntu 22.04 LTS is an official release (Jammy Jellyfish) released 2022-04-21, supported until 2027

privileged_info_summary: The task is a DevSecOps Docker security refactoring challenge. The agent must refactor an insecure Ubuntu-based Dockerfile into a scratch-based multi-stage build for a Go payment validator service. Project directory is /home/ga/projects/payment-validator, final image tag is payment-validator:secure, and it must be under 20MB. The application must run as non-root user 'ga' and demonstrate HTTPS functionality by printing 'HTTPS check passed' on startup. Scoring passes at 80% threshold (80 points out of 100 maximum), with criteria: image creation (10pts), rebuild during task (10pts), size under 20MB (20pts), non-root user (20pts), no shell (20pts), and HTTPS connectivity (20pts). The initial Dockerfile is based on Ubuntu 22.04 with Go 1.21.
